name: send_email_verification
description: Send an email verification message to the currently signed-in user. Requires a valid ID token from a user whose email has not yet been verified. The email contains a link the user clicks to confirm their email address.

parameters.name: requestType
parameters.description: The type of OOB code to send. Must be 'VERIFY_EMAIL'.

parameters.name: idToken
parameters.description: The ID token of the currently signed-in user.
